# Room Maintenance Coordinator (Uplizd) - Automated facility and unit upkeep management

## Summary
The Room Maintenance Coordinator is an intelligent Uplizd workflow designed to streamline facility upkeep by automating the lifecycle of maintenance requests. By integrating real-time property data from Apaleo with AI-driven task prioritization, this solution enables property managers to maintain high operational standards, reduce downtime, and ensure a seamless guest experience through automated ticket routing and status tracking.

---
